issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete: missing 'count' parameter (should look at 5 cards), missing 'optional' flag (up to 1), and missing support for type-based filtering (currently only supports ByName for 'Dracule Mihawk' OR {Thriller Bark Pirates} type)
Filter only specifies ByName 'Dracule Mihawk' but must also include {Thriller Bark Pirates} type cards as alternative reveal options
Missing action sequence: card placement step (place rest at bottom of deck in any order) is not represented before the trash action
TrashFromHand filter is empty and should specify count:1; also execution order is wrong - trash should occur after deck ordering, and thenActions array should be empty
